title: Make rand-assign independent of rand-init
body: `--x-assign` unique does not work if `+verilator+rand+reset` is not also set to unique. This PR makes the undefined initial and the x assign independent as the documentation would imply. This is one proposed solution, but I think the rand code could use a simplification or a refactor. It's a bit confusing having both build and runtime args for something that in my opinion should be a runtime only thing
